ddls:
CREATE TABLE "healthcare_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the facility is located */,
  "operating_certificate_number" TEXT /* Operating certificate number for the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the facility */,
  "type_of_facility" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., Hospital, Clinic, Urgent Care) */,
  "bed_count" INTEGER /* Number of beds in the facility */,
  "emergency_department_status" TEXT /* Status of the emergency department (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the patient (e.g., 0-17, 50-69) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (e.g., M, F) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the patient (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient (e.g., Spanish/Hispanic, Not Span/Hispanic) */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the patient's location */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the patient */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Level of education completed by the patient */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the patient (e.g., Low, Middle, High) */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the patient (e.g., Employed, Unemployed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being admitted */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the patient is admitted */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission */,
  "type_of_admission" TEXT /* Type of admission (e.g., Emergency, Urgent) */,
  "discharge_status" TEXT /* Status of the discharge (e.g., Discharged, Transferred) */,
  "length_of_stay" INTEGER /* Length of stay in days */,
  "admitting_diagnosis" TEXT /* Admitting diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES healthcare_facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission related to the diagnosis */,
  "ccs_diagnosis_code" INTEGER /* CCS diagnosis code */,
  "ccs_diagnosis_description" TEXT /* CCS diagnosis description */,
  "icd_diagnosis_code" TEXT /* ICD diagnosis code */,
  "icd_diagnosis_description" TEXT /* ICD diagnosis description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procedures" (
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procedure */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission related to the procedure */,
  "ccs_procedure_code" INTEGER /* CCS procedure code */,
  "ccs_procedure_description" TEXT /* CCS procedure description */,
  "icd_procedure_code" TEXT /* ICD procedure code */,
  "icd_procedure_description" TEXT /* ICD procedure description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procedures_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discharges" (
  "discharge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discharge */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission related to the discharge */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of discharge */,
  "patient_disposition" TEXT /* Patient disposition (e.g., Home w/ Home Health Services, Home or Self Care) */,
  "discharge_destination" TEXT /* Destination of the patient after discharge (e.g., Home, Rehab) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discharge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discharges_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing record */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission related to the billing record */,
  "total_charges" REAL /* Total charges for the patient */,
  "total_costs" REAL /* Total costs for the patient */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Cash, Credit, Insurance) */,
  "insurance_coverage" TEXT /* Type of insurance coverage (e.g., Private, Medicare, Medicaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient related to the insurance record */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider (e.g., Medicaid, Blue Cross/Blue Shield) */,
  "payment_typology_1" TEXT /* Payment typology 1 */,
  "payment_typology_2" TEXT /* Payment typology 2 */,
  "payment_typology_3" TEXT /* Payment typology 3 */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number for the insurance */,
  "insurance_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance (e.g., Private, Medicare, Medicaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the provider */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the provider (e.g., Cardiology, Neurology) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attending_providers" (
  "attending_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attending provider record */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission related to the attending provider record */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider who is the attending provider */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the attending provider (e.g., Primary, Secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attending_provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attending_providers_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attending_providers_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_providers" (
  "operating_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating provider record */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission related to the operating provider record */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider who is the operating provider */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the operating provider (e.g., Primary, Secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operating_provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operating_providers_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operating_providers_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "other_providers" (
  "other_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each other provider record */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission related to the other provider record */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider who is the other provider */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the other provider (e.g., Primary, Secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("other_provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_other_providers_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_other_providers_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "birth_weights" (
  "birth_weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each birth weight record */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission related to the birth weight record */,
  "birth_weight" INTEGER /* Birth weight of the patient */,
  "gestational_age" INTEGER /* Gestational age of the patient in weeks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("birth_weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_birth_weights_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "abortion_edit_indicators" (
  "abortion_edit_indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each abortion edit indicator record */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission related to the abortion edit indicator record */,
  "abortion_edit_indicator" TEXT /* Abortion edit indicator (e.g., N, Y) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("abortion_edit_indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_abortion_edit_indicators_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_department_indicators" (
  "emergency_department_indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency department indicator record */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission related to the emergency department indicator record */,
  "emergency_department_indicator" TEXT /* Emergency department indicator (e.g., Y, N) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emergency_department_indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_department_indicators_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfer_details" (
  "transfer_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer detail record */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission related to the transfer detail record */,
  "transfer_reason" TEXT /* Reason for transfer (e.g., Medical, Non-Medical) */,
  "transfer_facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility to which the patient was transferred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfer_details_transfer_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("transfer_facility_id") REFERENCES healthcare_facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfer_details_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readmissions" (
  "readmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readmission record */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission related to the readmission record */,
  "readmission_date" TEXT /* Date of readmission */,
  "readmission_reason" TEXT /* Reason for readmission (e.g., Medical, Non-Medical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readmissions_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)
